2012November 11, 2012

🇺🇸 Florida, USA

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Miami, United States, November 11, 2012 -- November 16, 2012

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2012-11-florida-usa

15 Resolutions

851Plenary
Endorse Howard Mason for reappointment as SC 4 Chair
SC 4 endorses the nomination by the Secretariat of Howard Mason for an additional three year term as the Chair of ISO/TC 184/SC 4 and instructs the Secretary to forward his nomination to ISO TC 184...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
850Plenary
Appoint Jean Brangé as liaison officer to ProSTEP iViP
SC 4 welcomes the offer of Jean Brangé to act as a liaison officer to ProSTEP iViP.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
849Plenary
Transfer ISO 16739 to ISO/TC 59/SC 13 and establish JWG
SC 4 requests participation in the development of the document to be created by TC 59 to facilitate the collaboration between SC 4, TC 59/SC 13 and buildingSMART, in order to establish the necessar...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
848Plenary
Create WG 23 Vocabulary Validation Team and appoint Dr Gerald Radack
SC 4 creates WG 23 "Vocabulary Validation Team" to execute the tasks required for managing SC 4 vocabularies of terms and definitions from ISO 8000 and other standards under ISO Directives Annex SK...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
847Plenary
Create WG 22 Reference Data Validation Team and appoint Nils Sandsmark
SC 4 creates WG 22 "Reference Data Validation Team" to execute the tasks required for managing SC 4 reference data from ISO 15926 and other standards under ISO Directives Annex SK in accordance wit...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
846Plenary
Create WG 21 SMRL Validation Team and appoint Keith Hunten
SC 4 creates WG 21 "SMRL Validation Team" to execute the tasks required for managing the STEP Module and Resource Library under ISO Directives Annex SK in accordance with SC4N2617 "Procedure for th...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
845Plenary
Revise scope of WG 11 for implementation and conformance methods
SC 4 revises the title and scope of WG 11 to: Title: Implementation and conformance methods Scope: * Develop and maintain International Standards describing EXPRESS and its extensions. * Develop an...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
844Plenary
Revise scope of WG 2 and transfer ISO 22745 and 29002
SC 4 revises the title and scope of WG 2 to: Title: Product characteristics and libraries Scope: * Develop and maintain International Standards for defining and exchanging product characteristics, ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
843Plenary
Revise scope of WG 3 and reappoint Paul van Exel as Convener
SC 4 revises the title and scope of WG 3 to: Title: Oil, Gas, Process and Power Scope: * Develop and maintain ISO 15926 * Develop and maintain guidance for the implementation and use of ISO 15926 *...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
842Plenary
Revise scope of WG 12 and transfer teams from WG 3
SC 4 revises the title and scope of WG 12 to: Title: STEP Product Modeling and Resources Scope: * Develop and maintain ISO 10303 (STEP) application protocols (APs) * Develop and maintain the inform...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
841Plenary
Establish liaison with ISO/TC 261 and appoint Dr. Martin Hardwick
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to establish a Category A Liaison with ISO/TC 261 covering activities related to Geometry and information exchange which fall in the scope of SC 4.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
840Plenary
Approve new project leaders and editors for SC 4 projects
SC 4 approves the following new project leaders or project editors for the associated SC 4 projects.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 offers thanks to Dr Tim King for leading the Forum on "Explaining the Business Benefits of SC 4 Standards" and to the SC 4 experts who contributed to a successful session.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

Acclamation

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its appreciation to Melissa Hildebrand and Krysten Wolf for their hosting and support of the 64th ISO/TC 184/SC 4 Plenary meetings at the Embassy Suites Hotel in Miami, Florida. Spec...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
